一套不存在电影的预告：假战(港)
introduction: A Saint Laurent by Anthony Vaccarello and Vixens production, in coproduction with L’Atelier.Jean-Luc Godard often transformed his synopses into aesthetic programs. Drôles de guerres follows in this tradition and will remain as the ultimate gesture of cinema, which he accompanies with the following text: “No longer trusting the billions of diktats of the alphabet to give back their freedom to the incessant metamorphoses and metaphors of a true language by returning to the places of past shootings, while taking into account the present stories.”
